sections.title: Talking to Head Guard without a disguise

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: This area is restricted. Leave now!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Long live General Khazard!

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Er... yes... quite right. Did you need something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just checking if you have any orders for me.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Not right now. Things are all very boring at the moment. What I'd give to be over at the bar having a nice Khali brew...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Khali brew? Can't say I've ever had one.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Oh, nothing beats them! Mind you, don't make the mistake of having too many. Last time I did, I ended up falling straight to sleep.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good to know, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: What a boring day. You'd think the slaves would be more entertaining.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not long now until you get a break though, right?

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Too right! Then it's straight to the bar for a nice Khali brew.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: What a boring day. You'd think the slaves would be more entertaining.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you still fancy a drink?

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: I really shouldn't...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you sure?

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Oh... okay then, but just the one.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: That is some gooood stuff... yeah... wooh, yeah!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you alright?

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Yeesshh! Oooh, maybe I sshould relax for a while.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good idea. I'll look after the prisoners.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Yeesh... that shounds reasonable. Here, take the keysch. Any trouble, you give... you give 'em a good beating.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I'll keep them in line

sections.title: Talking to Head Guard again in disguise

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Pleash... leave me alone. Did the walls always shway soooo much?

sections.title: Talking to Head Guard out of disguise

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Thish areash resh... restricted! We don't like strangersh... 'specially ones who sway. Oooh!

sections.title: After losing the set of keys

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, er... I lost the keys.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: What? You're foolish... and I'm all drunk. Here... takes my shpare shh... set!
